---
title: "Data-Analysis"
format: html
---

This is a Quarto tutorial for data analysis. It concerns on how to link R Quarto with GitHub server. GitHub provides free access to project staff regarding the progress and intervention practices.

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

Let's start our analysis by loading the appropriate dataset as:

Load dataset

```{r}
# Load dataset
library(readxl)
hdss <- read_excel("data/sample_hdss.xlsx")

# Show summary
summary(hdss$Age)
```

Load dataset - displaying only the results.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)

# Load dataset
hdss <- read_excel("data/sample_hdss.xlsx")

# Show summary of Age column
summary(hdss$Age)
# Sex distribution
table(hdss$gender)
```
